title: bus.hearth.tengine.silo.requested v1
description: Fired when hearth (home-automation) requests a specific tengine silo to be loaded. Source is hearth-phone. This is a control-plane event used to request sandbox environments for testing. Only 1 event observed in 4 days — likely a test/integration event rather than production.

source.description: Hearth component that requested the silo (e.g. 'hearth-phone').

requested_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the request.

args.description: Arguments passed to the silo request. Observed as empty in production.

pid.description: Process ID of the requesting hearth process.

log_path.description: Path to the log file for this silo request.
